passives.desc: If there are any enemies with 30% or less HP, use 'I Don't Need Ugly Things!!' Skill.
passives.name: I Don't Need Ugly Things!!

passives.desc:
Turn End: If Panicked, recover from Panic at the next Turn Start and reset SP to 0.
When recovering from Panic:
- Consume 30 [BloodDinner] to gain 2 [Enhancement] and 1 [BloodScissor] next turn, and heal 20 SP.
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner], gain 30 [Laceration], immediately take the damage from [Laceration], then lose 3 [Laceration] Count. Then, gain 2 [Enhancement], 2 [AttackDmgUp], and heal 20 SP next turn.
passives.name: Blood... Blood... Blood...!

passives.desc:
Gains a new pattern at 40% of this unit's max HP
Upon pattern change, gain 10 [Laceration] and 2 [BloodScissor].
passives.name: It's Not Over Yet

passives.desc:
If this unit is on field, or is one of the units that can appear on this Stage, increase [BloodDinner] value by the amount of [Laceration] damage collectively received by every unit. 
When this unit enters the field, the sleeping blood drenching the battlefield will rise above the surface.
passives.name: Bloodfeast

passives.desc:
Combat Start: gain 10 [BloodScissor]
- [BloodScissor] cannot drop below 1
- At 10+ [BloodScissor], convert them to [BloodScissorTwo].
- At 20+ [BloodScissor], convert them to [BloodScissorThree].
If this unit consumes [BloodScissor] and drops below the above thresholds, convert them accordingly.
passives.name: Bloodsteeped Scissors

passives.desc:
On Clash Win, if the target has [Laceration], heal this unit's Part & Core by 40% of the HP damage dealt.
Attack End: If this unit healed at least 100 HP, heal 10 SP
This effect does not activate On Hit with an Unbreakable Coin Skill if it loses the Clash.
passives.name: Hardblood Scissor

passives.desc: This unit's Panic Type does not change when inflicted with an effect that changes Panic Types. Instead, this unit is inflicted with an effect that is inflicted against Non-SP Units.
passives.name: Fixed Panic

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Laceration] on self (max 3)
skills.name: I'll Cut You Up All Pretty!

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume up to 20 [BloodDinner]; gain 1 [BloodScissor] and heal 3 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
- If this unit failed to consume [BloodDinner] with this Skill, gain 30 [Laceration]
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Clash Power +1
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Laceration] on self (max 2)
skills.name: Even Sharper

skills.desc:
[WhenUse] Consume up to 30 [BloodDinner]; gain 1 [BloodScissor] and heal 3 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] If target has [LineCutting], Clash Power +5
Heal 5 SP on every hit against [LineCutting]
skills.name: SNIP!!

skills.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Atk Weight +1 for every Stage of [BloodScissor] (max 2)
[WhenUse] Consume up to 30 [BloodDinner]; gain 1 [BloodScissor] and heal 3 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Clash Power +2
skills.name: I'll Cut You Up Too!

descs: [WinDuelAttack] Activate the target's [Laceration] (max 10). The target loses 1 [Laceration] Count
[WinDuelAttack] Activate the target's [Laceration] (max 10). The target loses 1 [Laceration] Count
[WinDuelAttack] Activate the target's [Laceration] (max 10). The target loses 1 [Laceration] Count
[EnemyKill] If this Coin effect killed the target, heal by 50% of the damage dealt against the killed target.

skills.desc:
[BeforeAttack] Atk Weight +1 for every Stage of [BloodScissor]
[WhenUse] Consume up to 100 [BloodDinner]; gain 1 [BloodScissor] and heal 3 SP for every 10 [BloodDinner] consumed
[WhenUse] If target has 6+ [Laceration], Clash Power +2
[EndSkill] Consume 10 [BloodScissor]
skills.name: I'll Cut You Together!

skills.desc:
[DuelCounter]
[WhenUse] Clash Power +1 for every [BloodScissor] Stage (max 3)
[WhenUse] Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Laceration] on self (max 3)
skills.name: How Discourteous!

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] If the target is at 30%- HP, kill the target
[EnemyKill] Increase [BloodDinner] by 30% of the defeated enemy's max HP

skills.desc:
[CantChangeTarget]
Prioritizes targets with the least HP percentage
skills.name: I Don't Need Ugly Things!!
